data.title: Commit removal of unused images (hero-abstract, julianna, merlins) and drop dangling avatar reference

data.body: Review of commit 95afbb5: ✓ PASS. All three PNGs (hero-abstract.png, julianna.png, merlins.png) have zero remaining references in src/, index.html, or public/. The only code change is removal of the dangling `avatar: "/images/julianna.png"` line from julianna's PEOPLE entry in houses.ts — safe because both consumers (AvatarBadge.tsx, BadgePlayground.tsx) guard with `person.avatar ?`. TypeScript typecheck passes. Test suite shows exactly 7 pre-existing failures (buttons×2, footer×2, navigation×1, neighborhood×2) with zero new failures introduced. Implementation fully matches the plan.
